_meta.description: Synthetic patient data for PreOp Navigator demo — single case

patients.demoRole: Single demo case — open colectomy with dual cardiac escalation + pulmonary optimization tracks

referral.indication: Ascending colon adenocarcinoma, 3.1 cm, T2N0M0 on staging CT. Surgical resection recommended by colorectal oncology.
referral.notes: Patient has significant cardiac and pulmonary comorbidities. Cardiology and pulmonary pre-op evaluation anticipated.

conditions.text: Atherosclerotic heart disease — prior MI with mid-LAD stent (>12 months ago, stable)
conditions.demoRelevance: RCRI component: ischemic heart disease (+1). Stent >12mo — NOT active ACS. Active cardiac gate: CLEAR.
Triggers pulmonary comorbidity flag; ARISCAT optimization bundle includes smoking cessation referral

medications._note: Empagliflozin (Jardiance) is the medication discrepancy — mentioned in transcript but missing from structured FHIR medication list. SGLT2i requires 3-4 day perioperative hold (euglycemic DKA risk).

fhirMedications.perioperativeNote: Continue until day before surgery; adjust per endocrinology sliding-scale protocol

fhirMedications.text: Fluticasone propionate/salmeterol 250 mcg/50 mcg inhaled BID

fhirMedications.perioperativeNote: REQUIRES CLINICIAN DECISION: generally continue for stent patients; confirm with cardiology

transcriptMentioned.text: I also take Jardiance — my endocrinologist added it a few months ago for my kidneys and heart. I take it every morning.
transcriptMentioned.resolvedDrug: Empagliflozin (Jardiance) 10 mg PO daily — SGLT2 inhibitor
transcriptMentioned.conflictsWith: FHIR medication list — Jardiance NOT present
transcriptMentioned.conflictType: omission — medication not captured in structured list
transcriptMentioned.clinicalSignificance: SGLT2i requires 3-4 day perioperative hold. Risk of euglycemic diabetic ketoacidosis (DKA) with continued use in perioperative period. Must be documented and hold planned.

observations.text: SpO2 — oxygen saturation by pulse oximetry

observations.interpretation: mild anemia — above ARISCAT threshold of 10
observations.demoRelevance: ARISCAT: Hb 12.1 > 10 g/dL = 0 pts (anemia component does not fire)
RCRI: creatinine < 2.0 mg/dL — component does NOT fire
GOLD Stage 2 COPD — FEV1 50-79% predicted. No ppo calculation needed (not a resection).

hb12_1.note: Hb 12.1 > 10 g/dL — anemia component does NOT fire

functionalCapacity.note: DASI 26 → ~3 METs — below 4-MET threshold. Limited by dyspnea and angina-equivalent exertional discomfort. Functional capacity assessment driving biomarker evaluation.

demoScript.title: Referral Received
graphMutations: Active Cardiac Screen ✓ (prior MI is stable — not active ACS)
Functional Capacity — MISSING (DASI questionnaire sent automatically)
ARISCAT = 59 HIGH → Optimization bundle fires: Incentive Spirometry, Inhaler Optimization, Smoking Cessation Referral, Chest PT, Prehabilitation
Medication Discrepancy — Empagliflozin in transcript, not in FHIR → Medication Reconciliation Required
demoScript.narration: Referral received. Protocol engine runs. Two tracks launch simultaneously: the cardiac spine sees RCRI=3 and waits for functional capacity. The pulmonary spine scores ARISCAT HIGH and immediately queues the optimization bundle — no testing required, just action.
agentActions: searchChart (DASI / functional capacity documentation) → not found

demoScript.title: DASI Submitted — Biomarker Ordered
graphMutations: NT-proBNP Biomarker node ADDED (elevated-risk surgery + RCRI 3 + poor FC)
demoScript.narration: DASI returns 3 METs — below threshold. Per AHA/ACC 2024, NT-proBNP is indicated. The agent searches existing labs first (cost ladder), finds none, drafts the order.

demoScript.title: Biomarker Order Approved + Lab Returns
demoScript.trigger: Approve Biomarker Order → Receive Lab Result
demoScript.narration: NT-proBNP 480 pg/mL — above the 300 pg/mL threshold. The graph mutates: a Cardiology E-Consult node appears. The agent searches for an existing cardiology evaluation, finds none, and drafts the referral.

demoScript.title: Cardiology Letter — Trust-But-Verify
graphMutations: Cardiology Clearance ✗ — conditional phrase detected: 'cleared pending echocardiogram'
demoScript.cardiologyLetterText: Mr. Delgado has been evaluated. He has stable ischemic heart disease with a mid-LAD DES placed in February 2020 (>12 months, no concerns for DAPT). No decompensated heart failure, active ACS, or unstable arrhythmia. From a cardiac standpoint he is cleared for the proposed right hemicolectomy, pending echocardiogram to evaluate LV function given NT-proBNP of 480 pg/mL.
demoScript.narration: Cardiology letter arrives. The Navigator validates content, not just existence. 'Cleared pending echocardiogram' — the clearance is conditional. The graph keeps the node open and adds an Echo requirement.

demoScript.title: Echo Normal — Cardiac Clearance Complete
graphMutations: Cardiology Clearance ✓ — all cardiac blocking nodes closed
demoScript.echoText: Transthoracic echocardiogram: LVEF 55%, mild LV diastolic dysfunction (Grade 1), no regional wall motion abnormalities, no significant valvular disease, mild LAE. Findings are consistent with hypertensive heart disease. No structural contraindication to elective surgery.

demoScript.title: Medication Timeline Approved — Empagliflozin Hold Planned
graphMutations: Medication Reconciliation ✓ — Empagliflozin confirmed, 3-day perioperative hold documented
demoScript.narration: Medication timeline approved. The agent caught the SGLT2i discrepancy — Jardiance confirmed active, 3-day hold before surgery planned. No autonomous hold instruction was generated; the clinician made the call.

demoScript.title: Ready To Schedule
finalPacketHighlights: NT-proBNP 480 pg/mL elevated → echo normal (EF 55%) → cardiology cleared
ARISCAT 59 (HIGH) — optimization bundle: incentive spirometry, inhaler check, smoking cessation referral, chest PT, prehabilitation
